text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I don't know how many times I raced<n>Tannhauser
on the beach... Nature<n>never told us to stop.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Then Urara went off on her own to<n>that deserted
island, and Rice<n>wouldn't stop crying...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
This has been the most tiring camp<n>since I entered
Tracen.
choice_data_list: But you look like you had fun!
But you look like you had fun!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Like hell I do! You want your butt<n>kicked?!

We have some truly enriching days<n>leading up to
the autumn Tenno Sho!
